spec_match.rationale: The simulated RUM record is only written when soft-navigation is unsupported; supported browsers rely on real PerformanceObserver entries.

interactive.rationale: Route buttons populate per-route summaries and beacon-style logs in fallback mode, while native support keeps the real observer pipeline isolated.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the RUM Dashboard concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Feature detection prevents double-counting and preserves the unsupported-browser simulation.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Duration badge colors now use design-token color mixes.

summary: The double-recording bug is fixed, the missing ChromeStatus link was added, and touched color literals were replaced with tokens.
